# Data Model: mos_target_cadence_epoch_parquet


MOS Target Table: cadence_epoch

## Basic Information
Constraints for a single epoch within a cadence.

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_cadence_epoch.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
222 KB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### label

- Column Name: label
- Description: Descriptive name for the cadence with a version
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### nepochs

- Column Name: nepochs
- Description: Number of epochs in the cadence
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### cadence_pk

- Column Name: cadence_pk
- Description: Primary key of the cadence this epoch belongs to
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### epoch

- Column Name: epoch
- Description: Which epoch is this in the cadence (0-indexed)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### delta

- Column Name: delta
- Description: Nominal (goal) time since previous epoch
- Unit: days
- Data Type: Float64


#### skybrightness

- Column Name: skybrightness
- Description: Maximum allowed skybrightness, i.e. moon illumination (0.0 to 1.0)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### delta_max

- Column Name: delta_max
- Description: Maximum allowed time since previous epoch
- Unit: days
- Data Type: Float32


#### delta_min

- Column Name: delta_min
- Description: Minimum allowed time since previous epoch
- Unit: days
- Data Type: Float32


#### nexp

- Column Name: nexp
- Description: Number of exposures in this epoch
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### max_length

- Column Name: max_length
- Description: Maximum allowed length of epoch, i.e. time between first and last exposure
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### obsmode_pk

- Column Name: obsmode_pk
- Description: Reference to the observing parameters (airmass, moon seperation, etc.)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


---

None
